sso.summary: SAML SSO for Organizations and Enterprise Cloud; OIDC for Enterprise Managed Users. Enterprise-tier feature.

citations.title: GitHub Docs — Identity and access management

ulm.summary: SCIM provisioning/deprovisioning for Enterprise Managed Users and SAML-enabled orgs.

entitlements.summary: Team/role sync via IdP groups (Team synchronization) on Enterprise; granular repo entitlements managed in-product.

riskSignals.summary: No documented CAEP/Shared Signals transmitter or receiver.

logout.summary: SSO session revocation and forced re-auth on Enterprise; no documented back-channel SLO.

tokenRevocation.summary: OAuth app token revocation API and PAT/token management; secret-scanning revokes leaked tokens.
